name: Elasticsearch
description: Elasticsearch is a distributed, RESTful search and analytics engine capable of addressing a growing number of use cases. This script installs both Elasticsearch and Kibana in a single LXC container, providing a complete search and visualization stack.

notes.text: Elasticsearch API is accessible at `https://<IP>:9200` (HTTPS with self-signed cert).
The elastic superuser password is saved at `/root/.elastic_password` inside the container.
Elasticsearch requires significant memory. The default 4096 MB RAM is the minimum recommended.
